title: UkCommonsRegisterInterestDetailsV1
description:
`details` payload of one UK Commons Register interest record (regime doc
Â§5). Optional fields serialize as explicit nulls so the contract surface
is fully visible in every candidate (fixtures `MANIFEST.json` convention).

category_id.description: API category id (Â§3.1 â€” NOT the printed category number).

interest_id.description: Source-native interest id, stable across in-place updates (Â§2.5).

member_id.description: Numeric MNIS member id â€” the Â§2.4 resolution audit trail.

parent_interest_id.description: Payment (child) â†’ payer (parent) link, category 1.x; null otherwise.

published_date.description:
`publishedDate` verbatim (`YYYY-MM-DD`); a null is rejected at
promotion (unobserved).

rectified_details.description: Rectification reason verbatim; null unless rectified.

registration_date.description:
`registrationDate` verbatim (`YYYY-MM-DD`); null on migrated legacy
rows (Â§3.6).

shareholding_threshold_raw.description:
Category 7 only: the `ShareholdingThreshold` value verbatim
(query-hot copy; also inside `fields`).

version.description:
`updatedDates.length` at fetch time (0 = original) â€” the filing
version key (Â§2.5).

DetailsField.description:
One `fields[]` entry, flattened per regime doc Â§5: `typeInfo.currencyCode`
is hoisted to `currency_code` (money â‡” `currency_code` present â€” never the
field name or type alone, Â§3.2); `value` is deliberately schema-`any`
(the payload is source-shaped and category-specific); `values` carries the
nested rows of complex fields (`Donor[]`, `VisitLocation[]`) and is null
on flat fields.

description.description: Source field description verbatim; null when the source omits it.

name.description: Source field name verbatim (open vocabulary, Â§3.2).

value.description: Field value verbatim in its source JSON type (Â§3.2 table).

values.description:
Nested rows (array of array-of-field) for complex fields; null when
the source carries no `values` key.

ValueSource.description: Â§3.4 value-rule provenance: which rule produced the Gold `value`.

oneOf.description:
R2a: category 7 `ShareholdingThreshold` monetary threshold string â€”
open-ended interval, low = stated threshold.

R3: category 4 visits â€” deterministic sum of the declared exact
per-donor amounts (single donor = that exact value).

R2b/R4: no monetary value in the record â€” Gold `value` is null,
never inferred.
